title: Tach Approval
description: A human approval gate on an effectful action in an action run (approvals/<id>.json). The driver writes it pending when it proposes the action; `tach goal approve`/`deny` flips it to a terminal status. The approval file is the durable truth for whether a gate is resolved.

action_id.description: The plan action this gate guards.

tool.description: The tool the action would call.

note.description: Optional operator note/reason for the decision.
